title: astragalus neomexicanus
intro: Astragalus neomexicanus, also known as New Mexico milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus neomexicanus include enhanced immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and improved cardiovascular health. Astragalus neomexicanus can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine and modern herbal remedies.
